rabo-encendido-cuban-oxtail-stew.name: Rabo Encendido (cuban Oxtail Stew)
instructions: Whisk vino seco, 1/4 cup olive oil, and salt together in a large bowl. Add oxtails and mix well to coat. Cover with plastic wrap and marinate in the refrigerator for 12 hours.
Drain oxtails, discarding all but 1/2 cup of the marinade.

Heat 1 tablespoon olive oil in a large pot over medium-high heat and sear oxtails until browned on all sides, about 2 minutes per side. Transfer to a large plate. Heat remaining 1 tablespoon olive oil in the same pot. Saute potatoes, onion, and carrots until onions are translucent, about 5 minutes.

Mash garlic and 1/2 teaspoon salt into a coarse paste in a mortar and pestle. Add garlic paste to the pot; stir until fragrant, about 30 seconds. Stir in green olives, bay leaves, sazon completa, sazon seasoning, and allspice. Pour in reserved marinade, tomato sauce, and chicken broth.
Return oxtails to the pot. Bring to a boil, reduce heat, and simmer, covered, until oxtails are fork tender and falling off the bone, about 4 hours.

rack-roasted-chicken.name: Rack-roasted Chicken
instructions: Place racks in upper and lower thirds of oven; preheat to 425°. Arrange potatoes and shallots in a roasting pan or baking dish just large enough to fit them all in a single crowded layer. Drizzle with oil and season with a little salt and pepper, then toss to coat. Place pan on lower rack, then set chicken, breast side up and tail facing oven door (this will make it easier to remove when it’s done), directly on rack above vegetables. Roast chicken and vegetables until a thermometer inserted into the thickest part of chicken thigh registers 165°, 35–45 minutes.

Insert a long-handled wooden spoon into the chicken’s cavity and carefully tilt the bird toward you to allow juices in cavity to drain into pan below. Remove vegetables from oven, then, using spoon, remove chicken from oven and place on top of vegetables. Let rest 10 minutes before carving.

rainbow-chopped-salad.name: Rainbow Chopped Salad

ingredients.item: Hazelnut oil or extra-virgin olive oil

ingredients.prep: peeled, diced, or 2 Fuyu persimmons, peeled, seeded, diced

instructions: Whisk vinegar, shallot, and honey in small bowl to blend. Gradually whisk in oil. Season dressing to taste with salt and freshly ground black pepper.
Combine romaine and next 6 ingredients in very large bowl; toss to blend. Add dressing and toss to coat.
Divide salad among plates. Sprinkle with blue cheese, if desired, and serve.

ranch-dressing.name: Ranch Dressing
instructions: Stir together buttermilk, sour cream, mayonnaise, dill, vinegar, and garlic powder in a small bowl; season with salt and pepper.

recipe-for-chicken-thighs-in-blue-cheese.name: Recipe For Chicken Thighs In Blue Cheese Sauce
recipe-for-chicken-thighs-in-blue-cheese.original_name: Receta de muslos de pollo en salsa de queso azul
instructions: Clean chicken and season with salt and black pepper.
Warm olive oil with a large frying pan with medium-high heat and seal its thighs till they are golden from both sides (about 4-5 minutes per side). Take them back and put them back.
At the same frying pan, melt the butter and spray the garlic for 1 minute, till fragrant.
Add chicken broth and scrape the bottom of the frying pan to incorporate all flavors.
Turn his thighs back to his frying pan with his broth and cover. It cooks at medium heat for 20 minutes, turning them about half as soon as they get cooked uniformly.
Take back your thighs and put them back.
Incorporates the cooking cream into the remaining broth and mixes well. Add the minced blue cheese and cook with low heat, stirring constantly, till the cheese melts and the sauce is homogenous.
Return chicken thighs to frying pan with salsa and cook for another 5 minutes to get them well impregnated with the taste.
Decora con perejil fresco picado antes de servir.

recipe-for-eggplants-stuffed-with-lentil.name: Recipe For Eggplants Stuffed With Lentils
recipe-for-eggplants-stuffed-with-lentil.original_name: Receta de berenjenas rellenas de lentejas

ingredients.item: 1 cdite of pimenton ((sweet or smoked as best))
Queso rallado  ((opcional para gratinar, puede ser vegano o regular))

instructions: Wash the eggplants and cut them in half, throughout. With the help of a spoon, remove his pulp and leave an edge about 1 cm. Reserve the pulp and half of eggplant.

It puts the half of eggplant into an oven plate, scrape them with some olive oil, scattle with salt and bake them at 180 ″ 3 ″ for 15-20 minutes, or till they are tender but without losing their shape.
In a frying pan, heat up some olive oil and add onion, garlic and red pepper. Fry at medium heat until onion's clear.
Add the pitted carrot and the pulp of minced eggplants. Cooking for 5-7 minutes, till the vegetables are tender.
Incorporates minced tomato, cumin, peppermint, salt and pepper to suit. Cooking for a few minutes till the tomato crumbles slightly.
Add the cooked lentils and tomato sauce (if you wish for more juicy pilling). Cooking all together for a few minutes, rectify the season and remove from the fire.
Rellena las mitades de berenjena con la mezcla de lentejas y vegetales. Si deseas, espolvorea un poco de queso rallado encima para gratinar.
place the stuffed eggplants in the pre-heated oven at 180 ″ 3 ″ and baker for 15-20 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and golden and the eggplants are fully cooked.
Decora con perejil fresco o albahaca picada antes de servir.

recipe-for-peppers-stuffed-with-mushroom.name: Recipe For Peppers Stuffed With Mushrooms
recipe-for-peppers-stuffed-with-mushroom.original_name: Receta de pimientos rellenos de setas

300 g of different mushrooms ((mushrooms, portobello, shiitake))

In a large frying pan, heat olive oil with medium heat. Add onion and garlic and pits till they are golden and fringe. It incorporates minced mushrooms into small pieces and pits till they release their juices and are well cooked. That may take about 8 to 10 minutes.
Add fresh spinach to frying pan and cook till they fade about 3 minutes. Saxony with salt and pepper and sweet peppermint.
Remove from the oven and fill them with a mixture of mushrooms and spinach. If you wish, sprinkle grated cheese above every pepper.

recipe-for-ripe-banana-balls-with-cheese.name: Recipe For Ripe Banana Balls With Cheese And Guava Tea
recipe-for-ripe-banana-balls-with-cheese.original_name: Receta de bolitas de plátano maduro con queso y ate de guayaba
instructions: Wash bananas, remove tipples and cut them into medium pieces.
In a pot with boiling water, add the pieces of banana and let them boil for 15 minutes.
When the bananas are at their point, remove from water.
Cut the pieces in half, remove the part from the centre and remove the shell.
Put them into a bowl and put them with a fork till they get a mass.
Haz bolitas de aproximadamente 2 cucharadas y luego aplana en forma de disco.
Coloca un pedazo de ate de guayaba y otro de queso, luego forma una bolita con la pasta cubriendo muy bien los dos ingredientes.
In a frying pan with enough hot oil, add the balls and fry till they have a golden color.
Retira, seca con una servilleta y espolvorea una pizca de sal.

recipe-for-scrambled-egg-toast-with-mush.name: Recipe For Scrambled Egg Toast With Mushrooms
recipe-for-scrambled-egg-toast-with-mush.original_name: Receta de tostas de huevos revueltos con champiñones

ingredients.item: Opcional: queso rallado, espinacas frescas, aguacate, tomate picado, cebolla caramelizada

instructions: Wash the mushrooms and cut them into uniform slices.
In a big frying pan, melt butter over medium heat.
Add mushrooms to frying pan and cook them till they are golden and tender. Take them back and put them back.
In a separate bowl, beat your eggs and season them with salt and pepper to taste.
In the same frying pan, add the scrambled eggs and stir them gently until they are cooked but still creamy.
If you wish, add grated cheese onto scrambled eggs and let it melt slightly.
Loan cuts of bread into a toaster or frying pan.
Coloca los huevos revueltos sobre dos rebanadas de pan tostado.
To accompany, add fresh spinach, avocado in slices, minced tomato or caramelized onion onto scrambled eggs.
Cubre cada tosta con otra rebanada de pan tostado y sirve de inmediato.

instructions: Bound water and add oregano leaves, whether they are fresh or dry

red-curry-mussels.name: Red Curry Mussels

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Bring coconut milk, tomatoes, wine, curry paste, and 2 Tbsp. basil to a boil in a Dutch oven or other large pot, stirring to incorporate curry paste. Reduce heat and add onion, carrot, and celery; season with salt and pepper.
Bring liquid to a simmer, cover pot, and cook until vegetables are crisp-tender, about 4 minutes. Using a slotted spoon, transfer vegetables to a medium bowl and set aside.
Return liquid in pot to a simmer. Add mussels to pot, cover, and cook, shaking pot occasionally, until shells open (discard any mussels that do not open), about 4 minutes.
Divide mussels and cooking liquid among bowls, top with reserved vegetables, parsley, and remaining 2 Tbsp. basil, and serve with bread alongside.

red-quinoa-with-parsley-and-toasted-pine.name: Red Quinoa With Parsley And Toasted Pine Nuts
instructions: Heat oil in a medium saucepan over medium-high heat. Add onion and season with salt. Cook, stirring often, until onion is tender and fragrant but not browned, about 4 minutes. Reduce heat to medium and stir in turmeric and red pepper flakes. Cook until fragrant, about 30 seconds.

Add 1½ cups water and bring to a boil. Stir in quinoa and lower heat to a simmer. Cover and cook until quinoa is tender and water is absorbed, 12–15 minutes. Remove from heat. Let stand, covered, 10 minutes. Stir in parsley and pine nuts, and drizzle with oil.

refreshing-arugula-and-parmesan-cheese-s.name: Refreshing Arugula And Parmesan Cheese Salad
refreshing-arugula-and-parmesan-cheese-s.original_name: Refrescante ensalada de rúcula y queso parmesano

2 cdas de aceite de oliva ( virgen extra)
1/2 cdita de miel o jarabe de agave
Sea salt and black pepper (freshly ground)

Fold the cuff onto the salad just before serving to maintain the freshness of the leaves.
Incorpora las lascas de parmesano y mezcla suavemente.
Sprinkle the toasted sesame as final touch.

refrigerator-oatmeal-cups.name: Refrigerator Oatmeal Cups
instructions: Stir oats, half-and-half, brown sugar, cinnamon, and salt together in an air-tight container until blended. Seal container and refrigerate 8 hours to overnight.
Pour contents of container into prepared oatmeal; stir. Slice a banana and add to oatmeal.

rhubarb-syrup.name: Rhubarb Syrup
instructions: Bring rhubarb and water to a boil in a saucepan over medium-high heat. Reduce heat to medium and simmer until rhubarb is falling apart, about 10 minutes.

Line a strainer with a double layer of cheesecloth, set over a bowl, and strain mixture. Gently press on rhubarb with a wooden spoon to squeeze out any remaining juice. It should yield about 2 cups of liquid. Discard pulp or save for another use.
Return liquid to the saucepan over medium heat and stir in an equal amount of sugar. Heat until sugar is dissolved, 2 to 3 minutes. Skim any foam from the top of the syrup. Let cool.

rice-with-walnuts-and-apricots-argiro.name: Rice With Walnuts And Apricots

ingredients.item: 8 Apricots fresh or dried or both
8 Apricots fresh or dried or both

instructions: If we use fresh apricots, we make sure they are ripe but tight.
Remove the pits and cut them into quarters.
Heat the olive oil or butter in a small pot, add the onion finely chopped and let it become transparent for 3-4′.
Add the apricots and sauté for two to three minutes.
Add the raisins, cardamom, cinnamon and rice.
Mix to butter the ingredients.
Add the warm broth, mix and lower the heat.
Add the lentils.
Simmer the rice with the pot half covered for about 15 minutes, over low heat.
Salt and pepper towards the end.
When little holes appear on the surface, the rice is ready.
Remove from heat and place a clean towel on the pot. Cover with the lid and let the rice rest for 5 minutes and draw its liquids.
Remove the cardamom and cinnamon.
Sprinkle with the chopped parsley and walnut.
Discharge the fork and serve on the dishes.

ritas-soft-butter-rolls.name: Rita's Soft Butter Rolls
instructions: Pour milk into a glass 2-cup measuring cup and heat in the microwave until it starts to boil and climb the sides, about 1 minute. Add butter, 1/4 cup sugar, and salt to the scalded milk; set aside to cool until it gets below 43°C (45 degrees C).
Dissolve yeast and 1 teaspoon sugar in warm water in a large bowl. Let stand until the yeast softens and begins to form a creamy foam, about 10 minutes.

Pour milk mixture into the yeast mixture; add 2 cups bread flour and egg. Stir the mixture with a wooden spoon until smooth. Add remaining flour, 1/2 cup at a time, mixing thoroughly after each addition, until the dough is smooth and a little tacky.

Turn dough out onto a sheet of flour-dusted waxed paper and lightly knead to pull dough together; shape into a ball. Place dough in a large, lightly-oiled bowl, and turn to coat. Cover with a towel and let rise in a warm place for about 30 minutes.

Line a baking sheet with parchment paper. Divide dough into thirds. Break each third into six evenly sized balls and arrange onto prepared baking sheet. Cover balls with a towel to rise further for another 30 minutes.
Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Bake in preheated oven until browned, about 15 minutes.

roast-salmon-with-miso-glaze-and-sugar-s.name: Roast Salmon With Miso Glaze And Sugar Snap Peas

ingredients.item: Olive oil plus more for brushing

ingredients.prep: green and white parts separated, finely chopped

instructions: Arrange racks in upper and lower thirds of oven and preheat to 450°. Brush 2 large rimmed baking sheets with oil. Purée teriyaki sauce, miso, and white parts of scallions in a blender on low speed until smooth. Arrange salmon fillets on a prepared baking sheet. Spread miso mixture over salmon, dividing evenly. Roast salmon on top rack until almost cooked through, about 7 minutes.

Meanwhile, toss 1 Tbsp. oil and sugar snap peas on remaining baking sheet and season with salt. Roast peas on bottom rack until crisp-tender, about 3 minutes. Transfer salmon to plates and sprinkle with green parts of scallions. Divide peas among plates.

roasted-alheira-with-portuguese-cabbage-.name: Roasted Alheira With Portuguese Cabbage Crumbs
roasted-alheira-with-portuguese-cabbage-.original_name: Alheira assada com migas de couve portuguesa
instructions: Cut the cabbage into pieces and cook it between 7 and 10 minutes in salted water. Drain and reserve. Light a pot with the oil and crushed garlic, add the crumb of the splattered bread and let it shine.
Adicione a couve, tempere com sal e pimenta e deixe cozinhar por cerca de 5 minutos. Retire e transfira para um tabuleiro.
Pinch the bales with a fork, lay them on the migas and water with a thread of olive oil. Take it in the oven, preheated at 180°C, for about 20 minutes. Remove and serve immediately.

roasted-beets-with-goat-cheese-and-walnu.name: Roasted Beets With Goat Cheese And Walnuts

ingredients.prep: top and bottom trimmed and beet greens retained

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat the oven to 135°C (135 degrees C). Spread walnuts onto a baking sheet.

Toast in the preheated oven until golden brown and fragrant, about 45 minutes. Watch carefully as they burn quickly. Remove from the oven and set aside until needed. Increase the oven temperature to 191°C (190 degrees C).
Crinkle up a piece of aluminum foil and place it into an oven-safe dish or pie plate. (The foil will act as a disposable rack.) Place beet onto the foil.
When the oven has preheated, bake beet until just turning tender, about 45 minutes. Remove from the oven and increase the oven temperature to 204°C (205 degrees C).
Wrap beet in aluminum foil and let cool for 15 to 30 minutes. Unwrap beet and peel with a sharp paring knife. Cut beet in half, then slice halves into thick half-moons.

Brush walnut oil over the bottom and sides of a baking dish. Arrange beet slices in the dish in a single layer. Crumble goat cheese into any empty spaces and then over beets. Season with salt and pepper.
Bake in the preheated oven until beets are sizzling and cheese is slightly browned at the edges, about 15 minutes.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 10 minutes. Drizzle vinegar over top, and garnish with beet greens, chives, and toasted walnuts. Serve warm.

roasted-olives-and-clementines-with-rose.name: Roasted Olives And Clementines With Rosemary And Chiles

ingredients.item: To 4 dried chiles japones or chiles de árbol

instructions: Coarsely crush chiles with back of knife. Place in medium bowl. Add rosemary, all olives, and 1/4 cup olive oil. Using vegetable peeler, remove peel of 1 clementine in strips. Using sharp knife, scrape off any pith from strips. Mix peel into olives. Cut peeled clementine in half. Squeeze clementine juice over. Cover and let marinate at least 1 hour and up to 1 day, stirring occasionally.

Preheat oven to 246°C. Transfer olive mixture to ovenproof dish. Cut remaining 3 clementines crosswise in half and mix into olives. Drizzle remaining 1/4 cup olive oil over. Season to taste with salt and pepper. Roast until heated through and flavors blend, 15 to 20 minutes. Cool 5 to 10 minutes. Squeeze juice of roasted clementines over olives. Serve warm with crusty bread.

roasted-peppers-with-feta-cheese-and-hea.name: Roasted Peppers With Feta Cheese: And Healthy Recipe
roasted-peppers-with-feta-cheese-and-hea.original_name: Pimientos asados con queso feta: receta fácil y saludable

ingredients.item: A handful of "mini" herbs (can be ruula, basil or as you prefer)
Optional: a balsamic vinegar chorrit to give an acid touch

instructions: First of all, get your oven hot at 200-3.

Wash your peppers and get them with a kitchen cloth or paper. Put them whole on an oven plate. So as well, we don't have to cut them and do anything complicated. Put them in the oven and let them get steamed for about 25-30 minutes, or till you see that skin starts to burn a little and peppers are soft.
When the peppers are ready, get them out of the oven and put them in a bowl. Tap them with a plate or some plastic film so they "sweat." That makes skin get easier after.
Mientras los pimientos sudan, corta el queso feta en trozos medianos.
Once the peppers are cold enough to handle them, skin and remove them. Cut the peppers into broad strips.
On a big plate, put the strips of roasted peppers. Redistribute the pieces of Feta cheese above and then add the "mini" herbs.
Rocía with a good jet of olive oil, and if you like the contrast of flavors, a little bit of balsamic vinegar will give you that perfect acid touch. Add salt and pepper to your taste.

roasted-pork-tenderloin-with-prune-and-a.name: Roasted Pork Tenderloin With Prune And Ancho Chile Sauce
instructions: Arrange chiles in heavy large skillet over medium-high heat; toast on both sides until slightly blistered and puffed, pressing often with spatula, 3 to 4 minutes per side. Transfer chiles to medium bowl (reserve skillet). Cover chiles with hot water and soak until soft, about 45 minutes. Drain chiles.

Meanwhile, place reserved skillet over medium-high heat. Add onion, tomato, and garlic to skillet. Cook until slightly charred, turning often with tongs, about 10 minutes. Transfer to work surface. Coarsely chop onion and tomato; place in medium bowl. Reserve garlic.

Place strainer over large saucepan. Working in batches, puree chiles, prunes, onion, tomato, and reserved garlic in blender with broth, wine, and orange juice until smooth. Press puree through strainer into saucepan. Discard solids in strainer. Simmer sauce in pan until reduced to 4 cups, stirring often, 10 to 15 minutes. Season sauce to taste with salt and pepper. DO AHEAD Can be made 4 days ahead. Cool, cover, and chill.
Arrange pork in 13x9x2-inch glass baking dish. Pour soy sauce over. Turn to coat. Refrigerate at least 1 hour and up to 4 hours, turning occasionally.

Preheat oven to 191°C. Remove pork from soy sauce; pat dry. Sprinkle pork all over with salt and pepper. Heat oil in large skillet over high heat. Add 1 pork tenderloin to skillet. Sear on all sides until brown, about 8 minutes. Transfer to rimmed baking sheet. Repeat with remaining pork tenderloin.

Transfer 2/3 cup prune sauce to small bowl; reserve remaining sauce for serving. Brush pork with some sauce. Roast until thermometer inserted into center of pork registers 63°C to 66°C, turning occasionally and brushing with more sauce, about 25 minutes. Transfer to cutting board. Let rest 10 minutes.
Cut pork crosswise on slight diagonal into 1/2-inch-thick slices. Arrange on platter. Spoon some of reserved sauce over. Serve with remaining sauce.

roasted-rice-recipe-lezzet.name: Roasted Rice Recipe

ingredients.item: 2 cups of rice (preferably honeydo or ottoman)
4 cup hot water or meat suy  u

instructions: 1. Wash Pirinci and leave for 15 minutes in warm water, then strain.
2. Take the butter and liquid oil in the pot, add onion and roast until pink.
3. Aka&ccedil combined with roasting or bird meats onions; min roast.
4. Add Pirinci: Add to Pirinci pot and add 2–3 minutes of roast, salt and spices.
5. U add 4 cup of hot water or meat water to your car.
6. Stop boiling.
7. Start boiling water, cut the gold, close the cover and wait until 15–20 minutes to water retc.
8. After closing the oven, brew the rice up to 5 minutes.
9. Mix the rice and serve as hot.
10.  Afiyet olsun.

roasted-sweet-potatoes-with-chile-yogurt.name: Roasted Sweet Potatoes With Chile Yogurt And Mint
instructions: Preheat oven to 400°. Toss sweet potatoes with 2 Tbsp. oil on a parchment-lined rimmed baking sheet. Roast, turning halfway through, until tender, 50–60 minutes. Remove from oven; increase oven temperature to 450°. Let sweet potatoes cool slightly, then tear into large pieces (including skin)—irregular pieces look best. Spread out on the same baking sheet and roast until browned and crisp around the edges, 20–25 minutes.
Combine yogurt, chile, lemon zest, and lemon juice in a medium bowl; season with kosher salt. Coarsely crush sesame seeds on a cutting board with a flat-bottomed mug (or leave them whole).
Spread chile yogurt on a platter; top with sweet potatoes. Scatter mint, sesame seeds, and sea salt over; drizzle with oil.
Do Ahead: Sweet potatoes can be roasted 6 hours ahead. Let sit at room temperature. Reheat in a 400° oven just to warm through before serving. Chile yogurt can be made 1 day ahead; cover and chill.

roasted-vegetable-and-kale-soup.name: Roasted Vegetable And Kale Soup

ingredients.prep: seeded, and cut lengthwise into 1/2-inch thick wedges

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat oven to 204°C (200 degrees C). Brush a jelly roll pan with a thin coat of olive oil.

Arrange carrots, tomatoes, onion, squash, potatoes, and garlic on the prepared pan. Drizzle remaining olive oil over the vegetables; season with salt and pepper. Turn the vegetables with a spoon to help coat evenly with the oil.
Roast in preheated oven until browned and tender, turning occasionally, 20 to 30 minutes. Set vegetables aside.

While the vegetables roast, place a large skillet over medium heat. Crumble sweet Italian sausage and hot Italian sausage into the skillet. Pour 1/4 cup vegetable broth over the sausage. Cook, breaking the sausage apart with a spoon as it cooks, until the sausage is cooked through and no longer pink, 7 to 9 minutes. Transfer sausage to a paper towel-lined plate to drain.
Cut squash and carrots into 1/2-inch pieces; set aside.
Peel garlic cloves; place in a blender with roasted tomatoes and onion and blend until smooth. Pour the mixture into a large pot.

Pour 1/2 cup broth onto the jelly roll pan. Scrape any browned bits from the surface of the pan with a wooden spoon or spatula; pour broth and browned bits into the pot with the blended tomato mixture.

Pour remaining vegetable broth into the pot. Add kale, thyme, and bay leaf to the mixture; bring to a boil. Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer until the kale is tender, about 30 minutes. Add sausage, carrots, potatoes, squash, garbanzo beans, and kidney beans to the soup; continue cooking until hot, about 10 minutes. Thin the soup with more vegetable broth as desired. Season with salt and black pepper. Discard thyme sprigs and bay leaf to serve.

roe-stew-with-fried-shad-teleculinaria.name: Roe Stew With Fried Shad
roe-stew-with-fried-shad-teleculinaria.original_name: Açorda de ovas com sável frito

ingredients.item: 500 g mixture bread or hard Alentejo

instructions: Season the shad posts with salt, vinegar and lemon juice and book. Bring to the fire a pot with water, let it boil, add the roes and the laurel leaf and let it cook for 15 minutes. Turn off the fire and let it cool.

Peel and peel garlic and onion; clean the skin tomatoes and seeds and cut them into small cubes; discard the blonde leaf of the roes and trim them slightly, saving a little to decorate; cut the bread into pieces, soften them in a little water and drain it with your hands.

Light a pot with the olive oil, the onion and the garlic. When the onion is soft, add the tomato and let it cook in a light for 5 minutes. Add the crushed eggs and stir. Add the bread and the branch of poking and season with salt and pepper. Shake and, if necessary, add some more water. Let the boil rise, remove from the fire and eliminate the branch of dust.

Light a frying pan with abundant oil and let it warm. Pass the fish through cornmeal, shake it well and fry it on both sides. Remove from the fire and pour it on absorbent paper. Decorate the açorda with the eggs you have reserved, cut into slices. Serve the fried shad with the hot steel.

rose-water-shortbread-cookies.name: Rose Water Shortbread Cookies

ingredients.item: White rice flour plus more for rolling

instructions: Whisk cardamom and 1 1/2 cups flour in a medium bowl and set aside. Using an electric mixer, beat sugar and butter in a medium bowl until smooth. Add egg and rose water and beat to blend.
Reduce mixer to low speed; gradually mix in dry ingredients (dough will be stiff). Cover and chill at least 6 hours or overnight.

Preheat oven to 300°. Scoop level tablespoonfuls of dough and, using lightly floured hands, roll into balls. Place on parchment-lined baking sheets, spacing about 1 1/2-inch apart. Using a fork or another utensil that can make a decorative pattern in dough, flatten balls to a 1/4-inch thickness. (Alternatively, flatten balls and make an indentation in the centers with your thumb.) Sprinkle cookies with poppy seeds.
Bake cookies until firm but still pale, 20–25 minutes. Transfer to wire racks; let cool.
DO AHEAD: Cookies can be baked 5 days ahead. Store airtight at room temperature.

russian-salad-with-tricks-to-make-it-peq.name: Russian Salad (with Tricks To Make It )
russian-salad-with-tricks-to-make-it-peq.original_name: Ensaladilla rusa casera (con trucos para que te salga perfecta)
instructions: We put some water in a pan. When I have been boiled we put our eggs and cook for 10 minutes. Let's get out of the water and get his shells out and put them back.

At the same time we have to cook water with two tablespoons of salt and add whole and pitted potatoes with carrot and whole and peeled. We let them cook for about 30 minutes, this depends on the size of the potatoes. When about 20 minutes have passed, we check if the potato's been baked with a fork. We remove from the casserole the potatoes and carrot, let them temple, peel and cut into crapes.
In another pan or pan, we add a teaspoon of extra virgin olive oil and cook the peas with a little salt a few minutes till they are tender.

In a large source we add potatoes and carrots cut into pits. Then we add the eggs. Traditionally only clear cut to pieces are added and the yolk can be used to decorate. The whole egg can also be broken if you prefer.
We put in the peas, well-run tuna and mayonnaise. If you get cheered up, you can even make a homemade mayonnaise and if anyone from the family suffers from an egg allergy, try our lactonnaise recipe.
We mix everything well, we give how we best love our saladilla and we decorate above with cracked egg yolks, olives and picket peppers. We put them in the refrigerator all night.
